items.example: She worked all day yesterday without a break.
My mother cooked a big meal last Sunday.
We visited our grandparents last weekend.
He studied English for three hours last night.
The bus stopped near my house yesterday.
They traveled to Da Nang two years ago.
She walked to school this morning.
We talked about our trip for hours.
He listened to music on the bus yesterday.
They watched a movie last Friday evening.
The children played football in the park yesterday.
She cleaned her room last Saturday.
He washed the dishes after dinner last night.
I finished my homework at 9 p.m.
The party started at 7 o'clock.
We arrived at the station two hours late.
She waited for the bus for 20 minutes.
He called his friend after work yesterday.
The student asked the teacher a question.
She answered all the questions correctly.
He opened the window to let in some air.
She closed her book and went to bed.
They returned home late last night.
I remembered her birthday and called her.
Something interesting happened at school yesterday.
